calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: THE CAUSE COMES ON CALENDAR THIS DATE IN DEPT. 505 FOR SMALL CLAIM APPEAL; APPELLANT LINH DAO IS PRESENT; RESPONDENT LAI CHIN CHAN IS ALSO PRESENT; FOR LINH DAO, MS. BAO-TRAN DANG, STAFF ATTORNEY, HOMELESS ADVOCACY PROJECT, APPEARS ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT MS. LINH DAO; MS. LINH THUY MUSFELT, CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE COURT INTERPRETER, ID #300210, APPEARS ON BEHALF OF MS. LINH DAO. 10:47AM: THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH; BOTH APPELLANT AND RESPONDENT MAKE INDIVIDUAL STATEMENTS TO THE COURT, FOLLOWED BY VOIR DIRE BY THE COURT OF BOTH PARTIES ON VARIOUS ISSUES IN THE CAUSE. 11:01 A.M.: MR. BING WU IS CALLED AND AFFIRMED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF UNTIL 11:05 A.M.;
THE COURT THEN ADVISES BOTH SIDES AND THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AT 11:13 A.M.
11:15 A.M.: ALL EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE PARTIES BY THE CLERK.

11:18 A.M.: COURT IS ADJOURNED. (DEPT. 505).
